pom.xml.general_idea: Set the Maven compiler release target to Java 21 to ensure bytecode compatibility with the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would compile to the default or previously configured Java version (likely 17), failing to utilize Java 21 features or potentially causing runtime issues if the target environment strictly requires Java 21 bytecode.

raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 support and modern Spring ecosystem standards.
raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading to Spring Boot 3.x is required to compile and run on JDK 21.

raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.why_exists: The project must target Java 21 to utilize new language features and ensure compatibility with the upgraded Spring Boot 3.x stack.

raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration and Spring Boot 3 requirements.
raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x is incompatible with Java 21 and does not support the Jakarta EE namespace required by Spring Boot 3; keeping the old version would cause runtime failures or dependency conflicts.

raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK version.
raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.why_exists: The build would target Java 17 instead of 21, failing to utilize or comply with the target JDK environment.

raspberrypi-boot-pushover/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration.
raspberrypi-boot-pushover/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x is incompatible with Java 21 and does not support the Jakarta EE namespace required by modern Spring Boot 3 applications.

raspberrypi-boot-pushover/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK version.
raspberrypi-boot-pushover/pom.xml.why_exists: The build will fail or produce bytecode for the wrong JDK version if the source/target compatibility is not updated to match the target runtime.

raspberrypi-boot-server/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration.
raspberrypi-boot-server/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x is incompatible with Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.x features; using an old parent version prevents access to necessary dependencies and configurations for the new JDK.

raspberrypi-boot-server/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK.
raspberrypi-boot-server/pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run against Java 21; keeping the version at 17 would result in incorrect compilation targets or runtime errors on a Java 21 environment.
